run_summary: EXP-075 (SEC-2b.7) + EXP-076 (SEC-6.8) integrated. SEC-6.11 curmudgeon c2 fixes applied. 14 patches self-applied, 3286 tests pass.

Resolved: git EXP-075 marked integrated (SEC-6.8 was patched); EXP-076 restored to non-integrated (SEC-4.5.9 not patched); EXP-077 added as retroactive audit trail for SEC-2b.7 work.

pipeline_status.curmudgeon: SEC-6.11 cycle 2 reviewed (4 findings: TLDR mismatch, misquote, 9-vs-8, PROS-007). Pending digest: 68 reviews (12 critical, 37 major, 15 moderate). Queue depth: 2 (EXP-050-r2 proposal, SEC-6.11 section-rewrite).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — 10th consecutive quiet poll. API endpoints (results.json, scorecard.json) returning 404 from GitHub Pages.

key_content_changes.SEC-2b.7: Added 91% null-entry finding as lead paragraph (32/35 scoreboard entries have no quantitative data). Updated TLDR, added WIN-025 double-counting, replaced Finlay citation with internal-consistency argument (dome's own W001/W004 noise floors), consolidated WIN-027, removed Kernel-of-truth label.
key_content_changes.SEC-6.8: Replaced incorrect single-exponential collapse argument with correct cosh-like profile math (r_S = R - r_N gives a sum of decaying + growing exponentials). Replaced IGRF comparison with flux conservation self-contradiction: dome's toroidal topology implies ~39 nT at south rim (area ratio ~1600:1); fitted equation gives 64,852 nT — 1,660:1 internal discrepancy. Updated TLDR.
key_content_changes.SEC-6.11: Fixed misquote (old data → existing data), fixed TLDR-detail mismatch (added OTS cross-reference), added 9-vs-8 counting discrepancy evidence, engaged PROS-007 head-on with 10-month timeline forensics, reframed 0-for-1 → 0-for-2 on dome-discriminating predictions.

expansion_tracker_collision_log.description: Analyst allocated EXP-075 and EXP-076 in workspace tracker for new SEC-2b.7 and SEC-6.8 work. Git tracker had pre-existing EXP-075 (SEC-6.8 single-pole) and EXP-076 (SEC-4.5.9 d_geo) with different targets — ID collision. Resolved by: (1) keeping git EXP-075 as integrated (SEC-6.8 was indeed patched); (2) restoring git EXP-076 to non-integrated (SEC-4.5.9 not patched); (3) adding EXP-077 as retroactive audit trail for SEC-2b.7 work. Recommend: tinker review next_id sync discipline to prevent future collisions.
expansion_tracker_collision_log.root_cause: workspace-sync lag — analyst updates tracker in workspace before decider pulls fresh clone. Multi-writer files need stronger coordination.
